revision.text: {{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Improve categories}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Improve categories | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-cat_improve | image = [[File:Wiki letter w.svg|50x40px]] | issue = This {{pagetype|subjectspace=yes}} '''needs additional or more specific [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]]'''. | fix = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} help out] by [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Categorization#How do I add an article to a category?|adding categories]] to it so that it can be listed with similar articles. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing additional categories }}<!--{{Improve categories}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: redirect unused template to en:
revision.text: #redirect [[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[en:Template:{subst:PAGENAME}]]" to "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]"
revision.text: #redirect [[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]] [[Category:automatic wikipedia template redirects I]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[Category:templates to undo 2 revisions on]]" to "<noinclude>[[Category:Templates to undo 3 revisions on]]</noinclude>"

{{ {{{|safesubst:}}}#invoke:Unsubst||date=__DATE__ |$B= <!--{{Improve categories}} begin-->{{Ambox | name = Improve categories | subst = <includeonly>{{subst:</includeonly><includeonly>substcheck}}</includeonly> | type = style | class = ambox-cat_improve | image = [[File:Wiki letter w.svg|50x40px]] | issue = This {{pagetype|subjectspace=yes}} '''needs additional or more specific [[Wikipedia:Categorization|categories]]'''. | fix = Please [{{fullurl:{{FULLPAGENAME}}|action=edit}} help out] by [[Wikipedia:FAQ/Categorization#How do I add an article to a category?|adding categories]] to it so that it can be listed with similar articles. | date = {{{date|}}} | cat = Articles needing additional categories }}<!--{{Improve categories}} end--> }}<noinclude> {{Documentation}} </noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
